reviews.comment:
Baños sucios.en varias oportunidades no recibieron tarjetas por "caída de sistema".tampoco pudimos obtener el descuento de socios.ACA. ni sumar puntos Serviclub por"no tener sistema"

(Translated by Google)
Dirty bathrooms. On several occasions, cards were refused due to a "system failure." We were also unable to obtain the ACA member discount or earn Serviclub points due to a "system failure."

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. En el Resto muy buen servicio. Recomiendo entraña con puré rústico. Suficiente para cena liviana para dos. El puré imperdible. Felicitaciones.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. I recommend the skirt steak with rustic mashed potatoes. Enough for a light dinner for two. The mashed potatoes are a must-try. Congratulations!
